zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Sanford於1040年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Thomas De Sanford I15歲，母親Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford14歲。他和Mrs Thomas de Sandford至少有4個兒子。他去世於大約1104年在英國史洛普爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.Bad Aibling, Oberbayern, Bavaria: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 巴德 艾布林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Sanford于1040年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Thomas De Sanford I15岁，母亲Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford14岁。他和Mrs Thomas de Sandford至少有4个儿子。他去世于大约1104年在英国史洛普爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sandford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Sanford was born in 1040, in Normandy, France, his father, Thomas De Sanford I, was 15 and his mother, Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford, was 14. He had at least 4 sons with Mrs Thomas de Sandford. He died about 1104, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Sanford est né en 1040, à Normandie, France, son père, Thomas De Sanford I, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Mrs Thomas de Sandford. Il est décédé environ 1104, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Sanford 1040 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas De Sanford I 15 und seine Mutter Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford 14. Er hatte mit Mrs Thomas de Sandford mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1104 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sanford è nato il nel 1040 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Thomas De Sanford I, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Mrs Thomas de Sandford. Morì circa 1104, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Sanfordが1040年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Thomas De Sanford Iは15歳，母Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundfordは14歳であった。彼はMrs Thomas de Sandfordとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1104年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Sanford(이)가 1040년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas De Sanford I(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Mrs Thomas de Sandford(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1104년 영국 슈럽실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Askham, Westmoreland, England, Great Bri: Askham, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sanford nasceu em 1040, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Thomas De Sanford I, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Mrs Thomas de Sandford. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1104, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Sanford родился в 1040 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Thomas De Sanford I было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford, 14. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Mrs Thomas de Sandford. Он умер около 1104 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Sanford nació en 1040, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Thomas De Sanford I, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mrs. Thomas De Sandford or Saundford, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Mrs Thomas de Sandford. Murió aproximadamente 1104, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
